bead.title: agent/test: migrate review_retry + review_failure_modes + review_taxonomy tests
bead.description:
Stage 1 of SD-024. Mechanical migration of ExecuteBeadLoopOptions literals in three review test files (~486 LoC combined).

In-scope:
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review_retry_test.go
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review_failure_modes_test.go
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review_taxonomy_test.go
bead.acceptance: rg 'ExecuteBeadLoopOptions\\{' cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review_retry_test.go cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review_failure_modes_test.go cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review_taxonomy_test.go returns 0 matches. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... passes.
